Name: Lingokids
Description:
Lingokids is a 100% safe and fun-based app with unique playlearning™ content for kids between 2-6 years old. It was launched in 2016, when its CEO, Cristóbal Viedma, was looking for an educational tool to teach English to his little niece.

Lingokids can be found in both App Store and Play Store and has a free version, which allows users to play 3 activities per day. The app also has an unlimited version, with which users can play unlimited activities per day, access our program center, play on all mobile devices, and play offline ($15/month approx). It is the #1 educational app in more than 9...

Name: Tucuvi
Description:
Tucuvi is a digital health startup on a mission to make healthcare accessible and efficient so that every patient has the best life quality, by providing continuous care at home through technology.

Tucuvi's product is a Remote Monitoring Platform, composed of a web platform for healthcare professionals and a device-free voice-based virtual caregiver for patients, called Lola.
- Lola is based on artificial intelligence (AI) and voice technology, and she reaches out to chronic and acute patients through personalised and automated phone calls, with the aim of monitoring their health status. Wh...

Name: Cabify
Description: Cabify goal is to provide an excellent service that replaces personal vehicles and company fleets.

Name: TaxDown
Description:
TaxDown is the first digital platform to file your income statement, while providing you with the best recommendations for managing your personal finances and your other taxes.
We work so that you can save and use that money to make those who love you happy

Name: IDOVEN
Description: IDOVEN busca detectar de forma temprana problemas cardíacos para prevenir enfermedades como el infarto de miocardio y la muerte súbita. Para ello estamos redefiniendo la manera en que se diagnostican las arritmias cardíacas combinando algoritmos de Inteligencia Artificial en la nube con tecnología wearable.

Name: Embat Technologies S.L.
Description:
Embat is a European fintech company operating in Spain, the UK, and DACH, offering a comprehensive, real-time treasury management solution designed to optimize financial operations for medium and large businesses. Their cloud-based platform integrates with over 15,000 banks and leading Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems, providing finance teams with enhanced visibility and control over their treasury functions. Key features of Embat's platform include:
- Real-Time Treasury Visibility and Control: Users can access up-to-date information on cash positions, debt, and transactions, facilit...

Name: Crisalion Mobility
Description:
Crisalion Mobility, a leading company in the design and development of advanced, efficient, safe, and sustainable electrical mobility solutions.
With its cutting-edge technology, Crisalion Mobility is committed to improving people's quality of life and contributing to the preservation of the environment through smart air and ground mobility solutions.

Founded in 2019, the company is a pioneer in the double commitment towards electrical air and ground mobility, using its own technologies to offer solutions designed for national and international operators.

• Pioneers in Spain and one of the...

Name: Embat
Description:
Embat is an all-in-one financial management platform targeting SMEs who strive to manage their finances and cash in a simple and intuitive way.

We offer a solution that provides automated and intelligent financial advice based on data-driven analytics and artificial intelligence. In other words, Embat aims to become the CFO that SMEs and freelancers cannot afford hiring and that would truly benefit from. We are not an ERP / accounting system, but we do offer a collaborative platform in which the relevant stakeholders (users, accountants, financial institutions, lending providers, tax authorit...

Name: Smart Protection
Description:
We are experts in brand and content protection online. Thanks to our team of cybersecurity experts and our AI technology, we protect the intellectual property for our clients worldwide.

As Member of Google’s Trusted Copyright Removal Program (TCRP), and thanks to our special agreements with the main digital marketplaces and social networks, we are able to delist infringing URLs, and remove illicit products and content quickly and efficiently.

Name: DEUDAFIX REPARADORA LEGAL GROUP S.L.U.
Description: MEDIADORES CONCURSALES, ECONOMISTAS Y ABOGADOS ESPECIALISTAS EN LA APLICACION DE LA LEY DE LA SEGUNDA OPORTUNIDAD. GESTION DE EXPEDIENTES MASIVOS

Name: Penpot
Description:
Penpot is the web-based open-source design tool that bridges the gap between designers and developers.

Our mission is to provide an open-source & open-standards platform to bring collaboration between designers and developers to the next level.

Name: Nova Talent
Description: Nova is rebuilding the sourcing layer from first principles. We combine a global, vetted talent ecosystem with agentic AI to identify and engage white-collar talent faster and more effectively while reducing the manual labor up to 99%, freeing recruiters to do more relavant work.

Name: Detektia Earth Surface Monitoring S.L.
Description:
The civil engineering sector is a vast and still under-digitized market. While some companies supply satellite or on-site sensor data, there's a notable absence of comprehensive integration. Application of machine learning or data science to this data is inconsistent. There is a significant gap in the sector regarding the digitization and integration of data and the application of AI to them.
Detektia integrates satellite and on-site data, generating AI-based alerts for the civil engineering sector. Detektia transforms the enormous volume of info provided by radar satellites into early warnin...

Name: Devengo
Description: Our API provides A2A infrastructure to create instant, programmable, atomic and bidirectional payments, cutting out any middlemen, increasing security and reducing costs.

Name: BetterPic
Description:
Discover BetterPic: the AI-driven solution for impeccable corporate headshots. Simply upload 15 images, choose your desired style, and within 2 hours, receive hundreds of flawless headshots.

Select and download your favorites from your results—they're indistinguishable from studio shots, yet up to 20x more affordable than traditional photoshoots.

Showcase the best of you, elevate your online presence with BetterPic.

Name: Wealth Reader
Description:
Have you ever wondered: How do financial institutions get real-time information about their customers' assets? The answer lies in APIs.

Regulatory APIs based on PSD2 provide access to certain financial information, such as account balances and transactions, and there are already numerous companies in Europe offering this service.

However, there are other sources of wealth information that are not accessible through these APIs.

This is where the new Wealth Reader API comes in, extending the information offered by the regulatory APIs by providing real-time access to additional sources of weal...

Name: Clevergy
Description:
We are on a mission to enable Home Energy Transition. How? Transforming the way energy companies engage with their users.

With our tech, companies empower their customers with intuitive tools on web and app platforms, enabling them to not only understand their electricity bill but also take control of and optimize their overall energy usage, including solar, batteries, EVs and heat pumps.

Name: Hamelyn
Description:
In this first stage of the company we buy and sell used books online giving users instant buying prices for each book they want to sell just by scanning the books barcodes with their phone at www.hamelyn.com. They complete the shipment by adding collection address and how they want to get paid (Transfer/Paypal) and we then collect them for free anywhere in Spain. Once we receive them at our warehouse we make an instant payment to them. We then sell those books through the main marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, Casa del Libro and our own online store.

Hamelyn wants to become the leading reco...

Name: Tower
Description:
Quasar is a new app-chain built in the Cosmos Ecosystem, optimizing inter-chain value capture with human-centric design. Its mission is to provide sustainable, sovereign, and ergonomic investment vehicles for digital assets.

Quasar’s flagship product will be yield-aggregating vaults that enable users to easily deposit Cosmos-based tokens, and passively earn yield generated from automated strategies. It will function like a decentralized, permissionless hedge fund. Its first strategies will be deployed on the Osmosis DEX, and the protocol will proactively expand to other DeFi applications ...

Name: Spika Tech S.L.
Description: Founded in 2015 by Cristina Zúñiga in Madrid, SpikaTech is a female-led enterprise. The company developed VR-CARDIO, a pioneering technology that offers holographic, non-invasive visualization to measure the heart's electrical signals. This innovation aims to enhance diagnosis and prevention of cardiovascular diseases, which claim millions of lives annually. Given the limitations of current technologies, VR-CARDIO, presents a significant advancement in fighting arrhythmia.

Name: Meep - Fostering Mobility SL
Description:
Meep is a digital mobility ecosystem that integrates all modes of transport providing operators, cities, and end users access to the latest tech for multimodal transport, data and complete mobility experience.

The services consist of three main lines:

1. Mobility and Smart City Platform (MaaS platform): This is a back-end software where cities, transport operators and authorities with already existing apps can link their apps to all of our transport services without having to create a new MaaS app. We have integrated mobility services providers, city service providers and many payment gatewa...

Name: Motoreto
Description: Motoreto is a fulfillment solution for automotive retailers, virtualizing their business needs in an all-in-one platform based in intelligent data behavior.

Name: bookahospi
Description: Bookahospi is building the trusted digital gateway for international careers. We connect professionals and organizations through smart credential recognition, visa orchestration, and compliant placement all automated and linked to official institutions. Today we help doctors and nurses work abroad, tomorrow any skilled talent, anywhere.

Name: Robinsun
Description: Robinsun enables households living in apartments to benefit from solar energy, generated at home for self consumption. Our beachhead product are plug & play solar kits. We are testing a battery system as well.

Name: Break-event
Description: We help live music professionals to reduce uncertainty and predict concerts success

Name: MedUX
Description:
MedUX es una compañía especializada en medición y mejora de la experiencia del usuario digital, entregando herramientas sencillas y soluciones innovadoras a operadores de telecomunicaciones, gobiernos y compañías.

Nuestro producto permite a nuestros clientes diferenciarse de sus competidores, reducir costes y potenciar su propuesta de valor, incrementando la satisfacción de sus usuarios y anticipándose a sus quejas. MedUX se basa en un modelo innovador sin integración.

MedUX trabaja actualmente con grandes clientes en 3 continentes, entre los que se incluyen AT&T, Vodafone, Telefonica, O...

Name: PandaGo
Description:
At PandaGo, we challenge the status quo of urban mobility with electric and affordable solutions. We set out to prove that cities can be sustainable, cleaning the air we breathe and eliminating noise by filling the streets with electric vehicles. To do this, we support key players in the transformation of cities:

For self-employed delivery drivers, we provide an electric scooter on flexible subscription for less than €200 per month and battery exchange points spread across cities for an efficient working day.

For companies, we help them to electrify their fleets with our ‘electric fleet as...

Name: Healthy Minds Analytics
Description: Working in mental health prediction.

Name: Nanostine S.L.
Description:
We synthesized nanoparticles in Ultra-High Vacuum (UHV) for surface coatings. These nanoparticle coatings are of great interest in the aerospace sector, for the coating of radiofrequency devices that are installed in satellites. Nanoparticles are also of interest in the energy sector, where coatings can be made on electrodes for hydrogen production or energy storage in batteries. Finally, we make coatings with nanoparticles for the development of sensors, where the precision in the size and purity of the nanoparticles is decisive.

There are a wide variety of companies involved in nanoparticle...

Name: Canard Drones SLU
Description:
CANARD Drones is the leading company in the use of drone-based solutions for NAVAID and airport inspections for both civil and military airfields.

As a technology company, we build the integral solutions that help airports all over the world. We provide tailored solutions for Visual Aids (PAPI calibration, ALS inspection, runway lights inspection), NAVAIDs (ILS inspection, VOR) and infrastructure (PCI survey and Obstacle control). All of our operational procedures are based on international standards and regulations such as those developed by ICAO or FAA.

With its leading-edge and customer-o...

Name: Strong by Form
Description:
Strong by Form is a technology company that is creating the future of wood. A future where we can build twice as many timber buildings using half of the trees, making construction more productive and sustainable, while making wood eligible for new uses in multiple industries.

Our digital wood technology, Woodflow, can produce high-performance lightweight structural shells that are strong enough to become a sustainable alternative to highly polluting materials such as steel, concrete, and aluminum in industries like construction and automotive.

Inspired by nature, we have realized natural woo...

Name: Card Dynamics
Description: Strategy and product

Name: StudentFinance SL
Description: StudentFinance is a Global Career Mobility Fintech platform - for reskilling and upskilling the global workforce. We're building the fintech infrastructure to ensure economic prosperity for millions of people by the end of this decade.

Name: Declarando
Description:
Our company was born 2 years ago with one mission, automate the traditional taxation consultancy.

We are working on creating a digital tool that uses technology to replace the human tax advisor.

Our current version uses decision trees to give personalise tax advice. Our mid term goal is to develop a more sophisticated solution that involves AI.

Nowadays we are helping more than 75k freelancers in Spain. However our tax bot can be easily exported to foreign markets only by adapting it to the national tax regulations.

Our goal is to create a digital tool that helps people and companies t...

Name: Bdeo Technologies
Description:
Bdeo aims to revolutionize the claims industry creating a real-time virtual channel when claim’s just happened (FNOL), improving the customer satisfaction, reducing costs and providing a powerful tool to fight fraud.

When a claim adjuster is needed after an insurance claim just happened, costs and deadlines increase for the company, assistance and repairing company. Multiple visits to insured make the quality of service worse.

Bdeo connects in real time the expert with the mobile application of the insured or the handyman. We simplify the process without the need for displacement of the expe...

Name: CrowdFarming SL
Description:
We provide al the necessary services farmers need to sell directly to end-consumers without intermediaries. We offer:

- an online marketplace where 250+ producers connect with more than 520k customers from 30+ European countries. It includes a managed payments infrastructure, and the whole technology stack and website.
- An end-to-end logistic service so producers can seamlessly ship to their customers.
- Agri-specialised customer support in 7 languages, 7 days a week
- Marketing services so farmers can make their products known.

​

Name: SNAB
Description: Automate finance process for complex multi entity organizations. Automations focus on accounts payable, treasury management, accounts receivable, and data extraction with AI with focus in asset management and wealth management

Name: Alcyon Photonics
Description: Alcyon Photonics designs very high-performance photonic devices that can be transversally applied to integrated chips for a broad range of applications: optical communications, biochemical sensing, spectrometry through micro-satellites, etc.

Name: HUNTY
Description:
HUNTY es la página web líder en búsqueda y contratación del segundo deporte más practicado de España... ¿Sabes cuál es?

La caza.

Conectamos cazadores con organizadores de cacerías de la misma forma que Booking conecta huéspedes con hoteles.

Nuestra visión en HUNTY es convertirnos en el referente en búsqueda y contratación de cacerías a nivel internacional mientras ponemos en valor el campo y su importancia en todos los niveles de la sociedad.

Fomentamos el turismo cinegético, de la ciudad al campo. Incentivando así las economías rurales y contribuyendo a la generación de oportunidades labo...

Name: Bequant
Description:
Bequant is a SW solution that accelerates TCP Internet traffic, so that the experience of customers accessing websites, using applications or downloading files is highly improved.

Most internet services and applications uses TCP as their transport protocol, which was designed more than 30 years ago, and although is very robust and reliable, it slows down communication when there are packet losses, jitter, bufferbloat or retransmissions, or the servers are far away (high latency), so the data it's not transmitted at the available speed in the network.

These effects are very common when a use...

Name: Backyard Brains Spain
Description: We offer easy-to-use neuroscience equipment to allow students and scientists of all ages to understand how the brain and human body’s electrical signals function. We design and build the electronics hardware to allow people to monitor the electrical rhythms of individual neurons, human muscles, human hearts, and human brains, all non-invasively. Our competitive advantage is ease of use, consumer-grade pricing, and software user interfaces. We have published books through MIT Press (in both English and Spanish) that extensively detail our experiments, making our equipment even easier to use wit...
